note: Derived from configs/starting_type_adaptation_v1.yaml (authoring input). This file is the normative source per proposal Section 12; the YAML is an authoring input only. Every derived protocol view (scoring_contracts, policy_crosswalk, claim_registry, exposure matrix) is generated from, or validated against, this contract's hash at LOCK time. Revisions marked PIN_AT_PHASE0 / PIN_FROM_paper_a_sft.yaml are NOT yet pinned; no field here is claim-bearing until artifacts/starting_type_adaptation_v1/LOCK.json binds it.

condition_semantics.unmodified: exact released/unmodified starting checkpoint; no training; seed sentinel -1; kl_beta null
condition_semantics.sft: ordinary completion-only SFT initialized from the unmodified checkpoint; beta==0
condition_semantics.kl_sft: KL-regularized SFT from the same unmodified checkpoint; reference = that same checkpoint via adapter-disable
condition_semantics.explicit_condition_required: kl_sft must NEVER be encoded as condition=sft plus a nullable beta

recipe.harmonization: shared_data_labels_seeds_optimizer_budget_lora; model-native prompt render + verdict serialization vary per checkpoint

llama_guard_3_1b.note: 20-token-pruned output head: extra PEFT/output-head smoke test required

family_gate.phase0_requirement: secure and snapshot at least one gated guard's terms before the lock; predeclare replacements
family_gate.equal_family_weighting: average checkpoints within family first, then weight every complete family equally
family_gate.missing_cell_rule: support cannot be declared from a favorable subset; all preregistered complete families enter under the locked rule; a failed cell blocks the fixed-panel aggregate

contracts.do_not_pool: study-native, official-native, and common views never substitute for one another and are never pooled

regime_benchmarks.held_out_label_caveat: adaptation-held-out is relative to OUR incremental SFT/KL-SFT; it is NOT 'vendor-unseen'

within_checkpoint_movement.causal_scope: this locked recipe on that specific checkpoint only; not comparable across checkpoints/panels

fixed_panel_interaction.expr: Gamma_a_R = mean_{f in F_P} barDelta_a(f,R) - mean_{f in F_G} barDelta_a(f,R)
fixed_panel_interaction.family_reduction: equal-checkpoint mean within family, then equal-family mean

headroom_normalization.reason: purpose-built guards start near ceiling; report headroom-normalized gains beside raw AP and interpret H_conc/Gamma jointly with U baseline

primary_contrasts.sensitivity_cardinality: beta=1.0 adds a separately locked 5-seed KL-SFT cell set

registry.content: equal-family H_gain and H_conc predicates plus every purpose-built checkpoint's SFT-minus-unmodified movement
equal-family H_preserve and H_cost > -m predicates plus every checkpoint's seed-paired KL-SFT-minus-SFT movement
family-level purpose-built movement vectors for SFT and KL-SFT
fixed-panel general-versus-purpose interaction Gamma, explicitly descriptive
rank concordance between represented and adaptation-held-out panels; standardized all-model ranking uses common-contract sensitivity
native-contract retention for purpose-built SFT versus KL-SFT
ExpGuard and mortgage contrasts, secondary and in-tier

primary_contrasts.exploratory_note: the complete model x benchmark matrix is exploratory; headline reversals may come only from this registry

decision_margins.m_rationale: two units of the report's 0.01 practical tie band; substantive maximum tolerated represented-source loss; NOT estimated from results

statistics.one_sided_lcb: 97.5% one-sided lower bound per family-level intersection rule
statistics.multiplicity: Bonferroni over the two confirmatory families RQ1,RQ2 at familywise alpha=0.05
statistics.conditional_scope: LCBs conditional on the fixed model panel; carry only eval-row + seed uncertainty; not between-model-family uncertainty
statistics.seed_pairing: ordinary SFT and KL-SFT paired by seed and data order
statistics.unmodified_treatment: one fixed realization (seed=-1), not five duplicated seeds
statistics.practically_equivalent_definition: prespecified equivalence interval lies fully inside the tie margin
